𝗣𝗢𝗠𝗣𝗘𝗟𝗠𝗜 | Securely scanning uploaded files for malware and threats within Node.js applications without sending data to external services.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely scanning uploaded files for malware and threats within Node.js applications without sending data to external services.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ In-memory file scanning
✅ YARA rule integration
✅ ZIP bomb protection
✅ Framework adapters (Koa, Fastify, Express)
✅ Zero cloud dependencies
✅ Privacy-first approach


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 496 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 19 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pompelmi is an open-source, privacy-first file scanning solution for Node.js applications. It focuses on scanning files in memory before they are saved to disk, offering features like YARA rule integration, ZIP bomb protection, and adapters for popular web frameworks.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/pompelmi/pompelmi

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗢𝗡𝗪𝗔𝗧𝗖𝗛 | To provide developers with real-time and historical insights into their AI API quota consumption across various services, helping them manage usage and costs effectively.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide developers with real-time and historical insights into their AI API quota consumption across various services, helping them manage usage and costs effectively.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time AI API quota tracking for multiple providers
✅ Lightweight background daemon (<50MB RAM)
✅ SQLite for historical data storage
✅ Material Design 3 web dashboard (dark/light mode)
✅ Zero telemetry, all data stays local
✅ Single binary installation
✅ Cross-platform support (macOS, Linux, Windows)


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 151 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 10 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

onWatch is an open-source CLI tool and background agent that monitors AI API quota usage across multiple providers like Synthetic, Z.ai, Anthropic, Codex, GitHub Copilot, and Antigravity in real time. It stores historical data locally in SQLite and provides a Material Design 3 web dashboard for easy visualization, ensuring all data remains on the user's machine with zero telemetry.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/onllm-dev/onWatch

𝗧𝗘𝗫𝗧-𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗕 | Quickly and easily copying text from images, videos, or application elements on Windows that cannot otherwise be selected.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔷 C# 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Quickly and easily copying text from images, videos, or application elements on Windows that cannot otherwise be selected.
📅 Created: Dec 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for screen text
✅ Local OCR processing using Windows API
✅ Copy text to clipboard
✅ Full-Screen Grab Mode (select region or click word)
✅ Grab Frame Mode (transparent frame for continuous capture)
✅ Minimal UI and no constant background process
✅ MSIX packaging for easy installation
✅ Available via Microsoft Store, GitHub Releases, Scoop, and Chocolatey


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 300 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 102 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Text Grab is a C# Windows utility that uses Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to extract and copy text from any visible content on the screen. It leverages the Windows API for local OCR processing, offering multiple modes for flexible text capture without requiring a constant background process.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/TheJoeFin/Text-Grab

𝗖𝗥𝗢𝗦𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗘-𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗞𝗧𝗢𝗣 | To synchronize clipboard content across different devices (computers) on a local network or via direct connection, allowing users to copy something on one device and paste it on another without manual transfer.  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To synchronize clipboard content across different devices (computers) on a local network or via direct connection, allowing users to copy something on one device and paste it on another without manual transfer.
📅 Created: Nov 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time Sharing
✅ Unified Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux)
✅ Rich Type Support (Text, Color, URL, HTML, RTF, Image, File)
✅ End-to-End Encryption
✅ LAN-only Serverless Architecture
✅ Smart Space Management


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 77 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 21 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CrossPaste Desktop is a cross-platform application that enables seamless clipboard sharing across multiple devices. It supports various data types and ensures privacy with end-to-end encryption and a serverless, LAN-only architecture.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
